hero.title: Handcrafted for Your Business
hero.subtitle: As a B2B partner for jewelers, we combine licensed gemology, in-house manufacturing in Germany, and generations of craftsmanship — for jewelry that delights your customers.
hero.servicesStrip: Invoice purchase · Ring adjustments · Engraving · Nationwide shipping

aboutPreview.title: Craftsmanship Across Generations
aboutPreview.text: For generations, we have crafted exclusive jewelry in Germany for discerning jewelers. Our licensed gemologists and master goldsmiths unite precision, aesthetics, and trust — from rough diamond to finished piece.

categories.title: Our Expertise
categories.subtitle: From diamond selection to finished collections — all under one roof.

expertise.title: Licensed Gemology & German Manufacturing
expertise.text: Our in-house gemologist guarantees the highest quality standards in diamond selection. In our own manufactory in Germany, handcrafted collections are created — precise, timeless, and ready for your showroom.

craftsmanship.title: Visit our manufactory
craftsmanship.text: Experience handcrafted jewelry made in Germany — precise, timeless, and ready for your showroom.

diamonds.title: Select diamonds
diamonds.text: Our licensed gemologist guides your selection — for transparency and the highest quality in your partnership.

showroom.title: Visit our showroom
showroom.text: Book an appointment at our showroom in Würzburg and discover collections that delight your customers.

signal1.title: 189+ partners
signal1.text: Jewelers across Germany trust our manufactory.

signal2.title: Made in Germany
signal2.text: In-house production in Würzburg — handcrafted and quality assured.

signal3.title: Licensed gemology
signal3.text: In-house gemologist for transparent diamond selection.

signal4.title: 128 years of experience
signal4.text: Generations of craftsmanship for discerning collections.

hero.title: Heritage Craftsmanship Across Generations
hero.subtitle: We are your B2B partner for handcrafted jewelry and diamonds — with our own manufactory in Germany and licensed gemology in-house.

heritage.title: Craft with History
heritage.text: Across generations, we have established ourselves as a manufactory for discerning jewelry. Every piece is created in our workshop in Germany — crafted by master goldsmiths who unite precision and aesthetics in every facet.

leadership.title: The People Behind Rösler & Engert
leadership.text: Behind our manufactory are the partners themselves — with a passion for jewelry, diamonds, and honest partnerships. In our workshop in Germany, we combine traditional craftsmanship with a commitment to supporting jewelers reliably over the long term.
leadership.imageAlt: The partners of Rösler & Engert in the manufactory

gemology.title: Licensed Gemology
gemology.text: Our in-house gemologist accompanies the entire process — from diamond selection and quality inspection to certification. This guarantees transparency and the highest standards for our partner jewelers.

manufacturing.title: In-House Manufacturing in Germany
manufacturing.text: In our manufactory, collections for earrings, rings, and necklaces are created — handcrafted, individually customizable, and ready for resale in your store.

hero.title: Handcrafted Jewelry for Jewelers
hero.subtitle: Our collections are crafted in Germany — precise, timeless, and ready for your showroom.

earrings.title: Earrings
earrings.description: From classic studs to opulent hoops — handcrafted earrings in gold and with diamonds, tailored for your collection.

rings.title: Rings
rings.description: Engagement rings, solitaires, and band rings — crafted with the highest precision and fine materials for your customers.

necklaces.title: Necklaces
necklaces.description: Pendants, collars, and chains — elegant designs that integrate seamlessly into your assortment.

hero.title: Diamonds of the Highest Quality
hero.subtitle: Our in-house gemologist selects and certifies every stone — for transparency and trust in your partnership.

expertise.title: Gemological Expertise
expertise.text: From rough stone selection to cut evaluation, our licensed gemologist accompanies the entire process. We offer a wide range of cuts and quality grades for your assortment.

hero.eyebrow: We look forward to hearing from you
hero.title: Let's talk
hero.subtitle: Whether partnership, collection, or diamond selection — our team will advise you personally.

hero.title: Services for jewelers
hero.subtitle: From ordering to customization — we support your business with efficient B2B services.

invoice.title: Invoice purchase
invoice.text: Reliable B2B terms with invoice purchase for registered partner jewelers.

ringAdjustments.title: Ring adjustments
ringAdjustments.text: Professional ring sizing in our manufactory — precise and on schedule.

engraving.title: Engraving
engraving.text: Individual engravings for rings and jewelry — for personal customer requests.

shipping.title: Fast nationwide shipping
shipping.text: Reliable shipping across Germany — securely packed and delivered quickly.

customization.title: Efficient customization
customization.text: Collection and material adaptations — implemented efficiently for your assortment.

hero.title: Your partner for jewelry & diamonds
hero.subtitle: We support jewelers long term — with personal service, in-house manufacturing, and licensed gemology.

story.title: Partnership at eye level
story.text: As a manufactory, we understand the needs of jewelers. Our sales representative model ensures direct contact, fast decisions, and reliable deliveries.

intro.title: Getting to know you
intro.text: In an initial conversation, we learn about your business, target audience, and assortment.

advisor.title: Personal contact
advisor.text: A dedicated sales representative supports you with collections, diamonds, and orders.

support.title: Ongoing support
support.text: From consultation to reorders — we are here for you.

growth.title: Grow together
growth.text: With new collections, customization, and events, we strengthen your showroom.

hero.title: Visit us
hero.subtitle: Experience our manufactory and collections in person — at the showroom or through our field service.

showroom.title: Showroom in Würzburg
showroom.text: Book an appointment at our showroom and discover collections up close.
showroom.point3: Book appointments online or by phone

fieldService.title: Field service visits
fieldService.text: Our sales team visits your store on request.
fieldService.point1: On-site consultation in your jewelry store
fieldService.point2: Samples and collections brought directly to you

hero.title: Frequently asked questions
hero.subtitle: Answers to the most important questions about B2B partnership with Rösler & Engert.

partnership.question: How do I become a B2B partner?
partnership.answer: Contact us via the contact form or book an appointment. We will discuss your business and suitable terms in person.

minimumOrder.question: Are there minimum order quantities?
minimumOrder.answer: Terms depend on collection and partnership. In a personal conversation, we find the right solution for your business.

catalog.question: How do I get the catalog?
catalog.answer: Download our digital catalog on the catalog page. After completing the form, you will receive the PDF link by email.

customization.question: Is customization possible?
customization.answer: Yes — from ring adjustments and engraving to collection-specific adaptations, we support you efficiently.

shipping.question: How does shipping work?
shipping.answer: We deliver quickly nationwide — securely packed and reliably to your store.

appointment.question: How do I book an appointment?
appointment.answer: Use the appointment link on our website or call us. We look forward to your visit in Würzburg or at your location.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.text: Our team is happy to advise you personally.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
1. Privacy at a glance

General information
The following notes provide a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website.

2. Data controller
Rösler & Engert GbR
Domstr. 18
97070 Würzburg
Email: info@roesler-engert.de

3. Data collection on this website
When you visit our website, technically necessary data (e.g. IP address, browser type) is stored in server log files.

4. Contact form
If you send us inquiries via the contact form, your details will be stored for processing the request.

5. Your rights
You have the right to information, correction, deletion, and restriction of processing of your personal data.

Please have these placeholder texts reviewed and adapted by a legal professional.
